category_sources: Official LikeC4 site says it describes system architecture with code and visualizes diagrams.
source_facts.description says architecture modeling tool with live diagrams from code.
display_name_sources: Official site and GitHub repository use the LikeC4 capitalization.
docs_sources: Official LikeC4 docs navigation labels the tutorial as Getting Started and includes specification, model, views, CLI, and tooling docs.
repo_sources: Official LikeC4 site links to GitHub, and the official repository is likec4/likec4.
tags_sources: Official LikeC4 site describes an architecture DSL and CLI workflow.
source_facts.description mentions architecture modeling and live diagrams from code.
